title: epidendrum cyparisii
intro: Epidendrum cyparisii, also known as the Queen of the Andes, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
